hypothesis: Fractional warmdown (last 60% of wall-clock) replaces iter-based warmdown, giving GPU-count-invariant LR schedule. On 1xH100 the old schedule accidentally crushed LR to 0.013 from step 0. With frac warmdown, LR stays at full 0.03 for first 40% (240s), then decays over last 60% (360s). Tests whether the model benefits from a proper full-LR phase.

lr_schedule.to: fractional warmdown 60% (full LR for 40%, then linear decay)
